name: SMN Corporation
summary: SMN Corporation develops and provides marketing technology products in Japan and internationally. The company offers Logicad demand side platform that allows data specialists and buyers of digital advertising inventory to manage various ad exchange and data exchange accounts through the platform; VALIS-Engine, and AI engine; VALIS-Cockpit, a marketing analytics tool; and SCAN, a closed affiliate network, as well as digital marketing solutions. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. SMN Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Sony Network Communications, Inc.
